response.overview: The Parched Collection is a horror trilogy from filmmaker Joe Leone centered around contaminated water, environmental collapse, and violent outbreaks of madness. Mixing creature horror, dark satire, and indie exploitation filmmaking, the series explores humanity’s destructive relationship with nature and the terrifying consequences that follow. Beginning with Parched, continuing through Parched 2: Hangry, and concluding with Parched 3: Beached, the films escalate from isolated contamination incidents to full-scale environmental horror.
response.title: Parched Collection
